default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing website updates, partner pages, and future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Human support remains a key differentiator for Smith.ai; use varied phrasing (e.g., "human backup," "human support," "escalated support")](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Partner pages to be updated with AIR focus, maintaining VR availability; minimize extensive changes as these pages are not heavily utilized](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Future projects include call flow design hub, infographics for blog posts, and expanding shared design assets in Figma](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Topics

### Smith.ai's Key Differentiators

  - [Three main pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
    1.  Human aspect: Provides peace of mind, handles complexity and escalations
    2.  Extensive integrations: Vast number of integrations, custom workflows using tools like Zapier, Make, N8N
    3.  Customization: Tailored plans, custom caller types, accessible at subscription price point

### AIR and VR Product Updates

  - [Human backup currently "all you can eat"; will become an add-on price per call in 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [New pricing rollout in September; Emily (Product Marketing Manager) to provide guidelines and FAQ sheet](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Outbound AIR timeline: 3-6 months out, involves revising instruction handling systems](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### Partner Pages Update Strategy

  - [Prioritize AIR while maintaining VR availability](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Remove bundled discount for AIR and VR; keep annual discount](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Minimize extensive changes; focus on incorporating AIR and moving on](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Work with Vol on dynamic areas (e.g., partner-specific content)](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Apply same approach as feature pages for testimonials and general content](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### Content and Design Collaboration

  - [Elvis waiting on design feedback for templates](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Potential expansion of design agency's role:](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Creating graphics for blog posts and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Assisting with presentation decks](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Developing a central design style book and shared assets in Figma](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Upcoming Content Strategy

  - [Business types page (small, medium, large enterprise) to be updated after industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Revisit call flow design content](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Elvis developing topic lists based on search queries, including AI-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete ongoing page updates (features, partners, industries)](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Update business types page (5 pages total)](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Proceed with template creation once design feedback is received](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Share upcoming content strategy, including AI-focused topics and call flow design](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Explore expanding design agency's role for broader asset creation](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Establish shared Figma workspace for centralized design assets](https://fathom.video/share/zXNA2rhDr3JxsxAdEDGndyNyqHs_6BJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
